_comment: Recorded COMPOSIO_SEARCH_TOOLS execute response, redacted + trimmed for offline replay. Shapes taken verbatim from the live 2026-06-27 capture documented in docs/design/agent-workflows/projects/tool-discovery/{research.md,use-case-walkthrough.md}. Queries: search github issues / create a github issue / post a slack reply / listen for slack messages (trigger).

results.use_case: search github issues for a matching report
recommended_plan_steps: [Required] Search existing issues with GITHUB_SEARCH_ISSUES before creating a duplicate.
known_pitfalls: [GITHUB_SEARCH_ISSUES] Search is rate-limited; cache results and avoid tight loops.
results.execution_guidance: Search first, then decide whether to create.

recommended_plan_steps: [Required] Create the issue with GITHUB_CREATE_AN_ISSUE supplying owner, repo, title.
known_pitfalls: [GITHUB_CREATE_AN_ISSUE] Requires the repository to already exist.

results.use_case: post a reply in a slack thread with a link
recommended_plan_steps: [Optional] Resolve the destination conversation identifier using SLACK_FIND_CHANNELS.
[Required] Confirm final content and destination, then post using SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE.
known_pitfalls: [SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE] Not idempotent; retries can create duplicate posts.
[SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE] Use exactly one of markdown text or blocks, not both.
results.execution_guidance: Find the channel, confirm, then send.

results.use_case: listen for new messages in a slack support channel
results.execution_guidance: No trigger search available; polling tools returned.

GITHUB_LIST_ISSUES_ASSIGNED_TO_THE_AUTHE.description: Lists issues assigned to the authenticated user across repositories.

GITHUB_CREATE_AN_ISSUE.description: Creates a new issue in a GitHub repository, requiring the repository to exist.

GITHUB_SEARCH_ISSUES.description: Searches issues and pull requests across GitHub.

SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE.description: Posts a message to a Slack channel or thread.

SLACK_FIND_CHANNELS.description: Finds Slack channels by name or pattern.

toolkit_connection_statuses.status_message: No Active connection for toolkit=slack. You MUST call COMPOSIO_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS (toolkit="slack") to create a connection BEFORE executing any slack tools.

next_steps_guidance: Resolve missing connections, then execute the plan.
